title: alnus serrulata var. obtusifolia
intro: Alnus serrulata var. obtusifolia, also known as the mountain hickory or smooth hickory, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to eastern North America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Alnus serrulata var. obtusifolia include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by infusing the leaves, bark, or roots in hot water or a solvent, and are often used to promote overall well-being.
